moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Group Stage Continues
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, hosted across North America, continues this week with crucial group stage matches as teams battle for a spot in the knockout rounds.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Who's glued to the World Cup? The group stage battles are heating up, and every match counts! Where are you watching the action?

angles.name: Team Performance
angles.copy: Big week in the World Cup! Which teams are impressing you most so far, and who needs to step up their game?

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival runs from June 18-21, 2026, featuring headliners Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris, The Cure, Sex Pistols featuring Frank Carter, Rick Astley, and Rita Ora.

source.l: Isle of Wight Festival Official Site

angles.name: Festival Buzz
angles.copy: Isle of Wight Festival starts tomorrow! Who's heading to Seaclose Park for Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris, The Cure and more? Let the good times roll!

angles.name: Headline Acts
angles.copy: From legends like The Cure and Sex Pistols (with Frank Carter) to pop powerhouses Calvin Harris and Rita Ora, IOW Festival has it all this weekend. What's your must-see set?

angles.name: Rick Astley Angle
angles.copy: You know the rules, and so does the Isle of Wight Festival! Rick Astley is on the lineup this weekend – get ready for some serious 80s vibes!

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Takes Over Glasgow Green
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green hosts TRNSMT Festival from June 19-21, 2026, with a stellar lineup including Lewis Capaldi, Amy Macdonald, Kasabian, Richard Ashcroft, Becky Hill, The Snuts, The Last Dinner Party, Two Door Cinema Club, and Nile Rodgers & CHIC.

angles.name: Glasgow Festival Fever
angles.copy: TRNSMT Festival kicks off Friday in Glasgow! Who are you buzzing to see on Glasgow Green? Lewis Capaldi, Kasabian, Becky Hill, The Last Dinner Party... the list goes on!

angles.name: Scottish Talent
angles.copy: Scottish legends Lewis Capaldi and Amy Macdonald are set to light up TRNSMT this weekend! Get ready for an incredible few days of music.

moments.title: Paula Abdul's 64th Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer, dancer, and choreographer Paula Abdul, known for hits like 'Straight Up' and 'Opposites Attract', turns 64 on June 19th.

angles.name: Pop Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 64th birthday to the incredible Paula Abdul on Friday! From pop hits to iconic choreography, she's a true legend. What's your favourite Paula track?

moments.title: Ann Wilson of Heart's 76th Birthday
moments.blurb: Ann Wilson, the powerful lead vocalist of the rock band Heart, celebrates her 76th birthday on June 19th.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Sending rock 'n' roll birthday wishes to the one and only Ann Wilson of Heart, turning 76 on Friday! Her voice is pure power. What's your favourite Heart anthem?

moments.title: Macklemore's 43rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper Macklemore, known for hits like 'Thrift Shop' and 'Can't Hold Us', celebrates his 43rd birthday on June 19th.

angles.name: Rapper Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 43rd birthday to Macklemore on Friday! His tracks always get us moving. What's your top Macklemore & Ryan Lewis tune?

moments.title: Gabrielle's 57th Birthday
moments.blurb: British singer Gabrielle, known for UK No. 1 hits 'Dreams' and 'Rise', turns 57 on June 19th.

angles.name: UK Soul Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the fantastic Gabrielle's 57th birthday on Friday! Her voice is pure magic. Which of her timeless hits is your favourite?

moments.title: Lionel Richie's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, known for his incredible solo career and work with The Commodores, celebrates his 77th birthday on June 20th.

angles.name: Music Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Hello! Is it Lionel Richie's 77th birthday we're looking for on Saturday? Yes! Wishing a very happy birthday to a true music icon. What's your favourite Lionel track?

angles.name: Party Tracks
angles.copy: Get ready to dance on the ceiling! It's Lionel Richie's birthday on Saturday. Time to crank up the classics and celebrate!

moments.title: Summer Solstice - Longest Day of the Year
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs on Sunday, June 21st, 2026, at 9:24 AM BST, with celebrations at Stonehenge.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Get ready for maximum daylight! Sunday is the Summer Solstice, the longest day of the year. How will you be making the most of it?

angles.name: Stonehenge Celebrations
angles.copy: Thousands will gather at Stonehenge for sunrise on Sunday to mark the Summer Solstice. It's a truly magical moment!

moments.title: Ray Davies of The Kinks' 82nd Birthday
moments.blurb: Sir Ray Davies, lead singer and songwriter of the iconic rock band The Kinks, celebrates his 82nd birthday on June 21st.

angles.name: Kinks Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 82nd birthday to the legendary Ray Davies of The Kinks on Sunday! A true British music icon. What's your favourite Kinks track?

moments.title: Brandon Flowers of The Killers' 45th Birthday
moments.blurb: Brandon Flowers, the charismatic lead vocalist and keyboardist of The Killers, turns 45 on June 21st.

angles.name: Killers Frontman Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 45th birthday to The Killers' frontman, Brandon Flowers, on Sunday! Get ready for some 'Mr. Brightside' celebrations. What's your favourite Killers song?

moments.title: Lana Del Rey's 41st Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, known for her cinematic and melancholic pop style, celebrates her 41st birthday on June 21st.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the unique Lana Del Rey, turning 41 on Sunday! Her music always sets a mood. What's your favourite Lana track?

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper's 73rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning pop icon Cyndi Lauper, famous for her distinctive style and hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun', turns 73 on June 22nd.

angles.name: 80s Pop Queen Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the incredible Cyndi Lauper on Monday! Her music still makes us want to have fun. What's your favourite Cyndi Lauper hit?

angles.name: Style Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the Queen of Quirky Pop, Cyndi Lauper, turning 73 on Monday! An absolute legend of music and style. Which of her songs is your go-to?

moments.title: Jimmy Somerville's 65th Birthday
moments.blurb: Scottish singer Jimmy Somerville, known for his distinctive falsetto and work with Bronski Beat and The Communards, turns 65 on June 22nd.

angles.name: 80s Dance Icon
angles.copy: Happy 65th birthday to the brilliant Jimmy Somerville on Monday! His voice defined an era of pop and dance. What's your favourite Bronski Beat or Communards track?

moments.title: Mick Fleetwood's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Mick Fleetwood, the iconic drummer and co-founder of Fleetwood Mac, celebrates his 79th birthday on June 24th.

angles.name: Fleetwood Mac Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the legendary Mick Fleetwood of Fleetwood Mac on Wednesday! A true rhythm master. What's your favourite Fleetwood Mac song?

moments.title: Curt Smith of Tears for Fears' 65th Birthday
moments.blurb: Curt Smith, the co-founder, bassist, and co-vocalist of the acclaimed band Tears for Fears, turns 65 on June 24th.

angles.name: Tears for Fears Icon
angles.copy: Happy 65th birthday to Curt Smith of Tears for Fears on Wednesday! The voice behind so many iconic 80s hits. What's your favourite from the band?

moments.title: Carly Simon's 81st Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning American singer-songwriter Carly Simon, known for 'You're So Vain' and 'Nobody Does It Better', turns 81 on June 25th.

angles.name: Singer-Songwriter Legend
angles.copy: You're so... 81! Happy birthday to the incredible Carly Simon on Thursday! Her songs are timeless. What's your top Carly Simon track?

moments.title: Benson Boone's 23rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Rising American singer-songwriter Benson Boone, who gained fame with 'Beautiful Things', celebrates his 23rd birthday on June 25th.

angles.name: New Music Star
angles.copy: Happy 23rd birthday to Benson Boone on Thursday! 'Beautiful Things' has been everywhere, and he's just getting started. What's your favourite song from him?

moments.title: Ariana Grande's 33rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Ariana Grande, known for her powerful vocals and chart-topping hits, turns 33 on June 26th.

angles.name: Pop Queen Birthday
angles.copy: It's Ariana Grande's 33rd birthday on Friday! From pop anthems to vocal masterclasses, she continues to reign. What's your ultimate Ariana track?

angles.name: Celebrating Ariana
angles.copy: Get ready for a 'Thank U, Next' level celebration! Ariana Grande turns 33 on Friday. Which of her hits gets you dancing?

moments.title: Mick Jones of The Clash's 71st Birthday
moments.blurb: Mick Jones, co-founder, guitarist, and vocalist of the legendary punk rock band The Clash, turns 71 on June 26th.

angles.name: Punk Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 71st birthday to the one and only Mick Jones of The Clash on Friday! A true punk rock pioneer. What's your favourite Clash song?

moments.title: Chris Isaak's 70th Birthday
moments.blurb: American rockabilly and pop crooner Chris Isaak, known for his distinctive voice and hits like 'Wicked Game', turns 70 on June 26th.

angles.name: Rockabilly Crooner
angles.copy: Wishing a cool 70th birthday to Chris Isaak on Friday! His 'Wicked Game' is an absolute classic. What's your favourite Chris Isaak track?
